subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Hearken unto My call and bear thou witness unto that which God Himself testified before the creation of earth and heaven, that verily there is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جواد اسمع ندائی ثم اشهد بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارضین بانه لا
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
